title: Probe libfoo 2.0 streaming API against the ingest fixture
content: Spike: wire adapters/ingest.py to libfoo 2.0 streaming and run the fixture suite. Files: adapters/ingest.py, tests/test_ingest.py.

title: Migrate export adapter to streaming
content: Port adapters/export.py to the streaming API. Files: adapters/export.py.
depends_on: Probe libfoo 2.0 streaming API against the ingest fixture

title: Migrate relay adapter to streaming
content: Port adapters/relay.py to the streaming API. Files: adapters/relay.py.
depends_on: Probe libfoo 2.0 streaming API against the ingest fixture
